subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! God hath come with manifest sovereignty. The people have denied Him and turned away, save those whom God, the Lord, hath willed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله قد اتی الله بسلطان مبین قد انکره القوم و اعرضوا عنه الا من شاءالله رب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
